title: stelis cubicularia
intro: Stelis cubicularia, also known as the Cubical Stelis, is a type of orchid species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Stelis cubicularia include its potential to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal use, and is also sometimes used in folk remedies to treat various health conditions.
